summary: Colombia uses a 10-digit tariff code system. First 6 digits are international HS codes, plus 2 digits for Andean Community (CAN), plus 2 digits exclusive to Colombia. Governed by Decree 2153 of 2016.

data_availability.official_source: DIAN (Dirección de Impuestos y Aduanas Nacionales)

sources.name: DIAN - Official Customs Authority
sources.description: Colombian tax and customs authority responsible for tariff classifications

sources.name: DIAN Arancel Tool
sources.description: Interactive tool for 10-digit tariff code classification and duty queries

sources.name: World Bank WITS
sources.description: World Bank's tariff database with Colombian schedules

next_steps: Access DIAN Arancel tool at https://muisca.dian.gov.co/
Compile tariff rates from DIAN database
notes: DIAN Arancel tool is primary access point. Tool uses 10-digit classification system based on HS + CAN + Colombian-specific extensions. Bulk download not explicitly mentioned but may be available through DIAN upon request.
